sections.content: Let me check the current state after the LEFT move. I need to see where the black F is now and whether it's properly aligned with the yellow F.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Current nodes:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] > 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"  Color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min_r}-{max_r}, cols={min_c}-{max_c}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
